title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-1000
summary: 1 Petitioner, a member of the Jehovah's Witnesses, stands convicted of failing to submit to induction into the armed forces in violation of § 12(a) of the Universal Military Training and Service Act, 62 Stat. 622, 50 U.S.C.Appendix, § 462(a), 50 U.S.C.A.Appendix, § 462(a).
